title: Charge case outside screen/third screen, left zoom in/out
scenario: Verify zoom in/out functionality on the third screen (charge case outside) by clicking the left circle button to zoom in (revealing new text) and clicking again to zoom out to the original screen.
steps: Click left circle button to zoom in (new text appears)
Click circle button again to zoom out to original screen showing charge case outside
expected: Zoom in shows new text, zoom out returns to original screen showing charge case outside
